violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. A prep cooler has duct tape holding the lids together.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system above the pizza oven was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm .

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use containers were stored on the floor in the storage area.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. A chemical spray bottle was not labled.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed duct tape being used to hold together a prep cooler doors.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
